allura-brain.rationale: Primary Allura Brain MCP server — canonical memory interface for all agents. Provides query_traces (via memory_search on events), query_insights (via memory_search on Neo4j graph), and full CRUD for episodic + semantic memory. Brain = Postgres events + Neo4j graphs + pgvector embeddings.

neo4j-cypher.rationale: Restricted raw Cypher access to Neo4j knowledge graph — use only for privileged graph maintenance, schema inspection, and governed writes.

neo4j-memory.rationale: Default safe Neo4j graph surface — use for standard search and CRUD without exposing raw Cypher to every agent.
